profile.name: Manroop Singh
profile.title: Software Developer | GSoC 2026 Contributor | Full Stack & Mobile App Developer
profile.intro: I build scalable web and mobile products, modernize frontend systems, and contribute to open-source healthcare technology with a focus on maintainable React, TypeScript, and full-stack architecture.

seo.title: Manroop Singh | Software Developer Portfolio
seo.description: Portfolio of Manroop Singh, a GSoC 2026 Contributor, full-stack developer, and mobile app developer specializing in React, TypeScript, React Native, and backend systems.

about.title: Building modern products with open-source discipline.
paragraphs: I am pursuing a B.Tech in Information Technology from ABV IIITM Gwalior, where I focus on software engineering, scalable product development, and applied systems thinking. My work spans frontend modernization, mobile apps, backend systems, and collaborative open-source development.

I enjoy turning complex product requirements into reliable interfaces and maintainable code. Recently, that has meant improving React and TypeScript systems for healthcare workflows while also building full-stack and mobile projects with strong user-facing performance.
focusAreas: Frontend modernization with React and TypeScript
Mobile app development with React Native and Expo
Backend APIs with Node.js, Express, and databases

highlights: Selected as a Google Summer of Code 2026 Contributor at OpenELIS Global.
Contributing to frontend modernization and performance optimization initiatives.
Migrated React frontend components from JavaScript to TypeScript, improving type safety, maintainability, and developer experience.
Refactored shared UI components, utilities, and application modules while ensuring compatibility with the existing healthcare workflow system.
Enhanced frontend performance through code optimization, reducing technical debt and supporting long-term scalability.
Collaborated with international mentors and open-source contributors using Git, GitHub, code reviews, testing, and agile development practices.

projects.name: PromptX
highlights: Released a marketplace where users can buy and sell system and user prompts for AI.
Added Google OAuth authentication and Redux-based state management.
Reduced image loading times by 70% using CDN caching with Cloudinary.
Integrated a DeepSeek-R1 chatbot with 8 dedicated AI action buttons for targeted tasks like GeneralAI and SoftwareAI.

projects.name: Open Course
highlights: Built a crowdsourced learning platform where users can contribute by adding videos to existing courses.
Enabled dynamic course updates and real-time synchronization across contributors.
Developed an interview preparation section with 50+ practice questions.
